storyboard_assets.prompt:
Two-panel horizontal split divided by a thin white straight line, no rounded corners, no shadow, no gradient, no gap between panels. Left panel slightly wider. Left panel: close mid-shot of two tiny officials in animated discussion, one gesturing toward a large pocket watch resting on the stone floor, heads tilted together in puzzlement, expressions of bewilderment and curiosity. Right panel: inset memory/flashback frame with slightly different light treatment, showing a giant hand holding a pocket watch up to eye level, speech bubble in the upper area with handwritten English text: "I never do anything without looking at this first."

Left panel figures standing on coarse stone slabs looking down at the oversized watch face, pointing and conferring. Right panel flashback shows the watch gleaming in the giant's grip, its chain swaying.

Ancient stone temple interior: soaring stone vaulted ceiling five to six times human height, thick stone walls, tall narrow arched windows letting in slanted light beams, heavy wooden doors in background, coarse-hewn stone floor, iron rings and thick iron chain anchor points along the lower walls.

Left panel: cool grey ambient stone light, faint dusty shaft of light through arched window, pale gold glint off the watch face. Right panel: warmer sepia-toned flashback light, soft vignette edge.

Left panel: two extremely small figures, one with short brown hair and a narrow face in a deep-blue official robe with round collar, small black buttons, and white cuffs showing at the wrists. Right panel: oversized giant hand (no full body visible), holding a detailed pocket watch with visible clock face.

STYLE_PLACEHOLDER

Character appearance, costume details, and scene furniture strictly follow reference images; no self-added or modified details; consistent character proportions throughout. Two-panel layout: thin white straight dividing line, no rounded corners, no shadow, no gradient, no gap between panels; no outer border on the full image. Scene fingerprint: soaring stone vaulted ceiling, coarse-hewn stone floor with iron anchor rings, tall narrow arched windows. Tiny official figure: deep-blue robe with round collar and small black buttons, no beard no stubble. Lilliputian figures stand no taller than the giant's palm width. Speech bubble present: English spelling correct, no floating text outside bubble, no caption text, no title text, bubble does not obscure main subject. All English letters inside bubble use handwritten style: casual hand-lettered strokes, bold and energetic lines, slight baseline variation, natural letter spacing.

Two-panel horizontal split divided by a thin white straight line, no rounded corners, no shadow, no gradient, no gap between panels. Left panel: extreme close-up detail shot of a massive leather belt worn around a giant torso, a colossal sword hanging from it — blade length visually spanning nearly the full panel height, the sword scabbard richly detailed with worn leather and metal fittings. Two tiny official figures stand at belt level for scale, craning necks upward. Right panel: close-up detail of a large canvas pouch hanging from the belt, its flap partially open, revealing rough-textured black powder and several heavy spherical metal balls tumbling out slightly, the officials peering in with cautious curiosity.

Left panel figures dwarfed completely by the sword length; right panel officials lean in to inspect bag contents with fascinated and uncertain expressions.

Ancient stone temple interior: soaring stone vaulted ceiling, thick stone walls, tall narrow arched windows, coarse-hewn stone floor.

Left panel: cool side-lighting accentuating the sword's metallic edge, leather belt texture in warm brown tones. Right panel: slightly warmer light from arched window highlighting the texture of black powder and metallic sheen of the balls.

Two extremely small Lilliputian officials with short brown hair, narrow faces, deep-blue official robes with small black buttons and white cuffs. Giant props: oversized leather belt, enormous sword in scabbard, large canvas belt pouch with black powder and metal balls.

Single panel, no outer border. Medium close-up shot centered on the giant man's face and upper torso, angled slightly downward as if looking toward the tiny officials below frame. His expression is subtly guarded — a faint private smile, eyes slightly averted, one large hand pressed flat and inconspicuously over a side coat pocket as if concealing something inside it. The body language is natural but deliberate, the touch almost casual yet protective.

The man stands in a relaxed posture, coat hand resting over the hidden pocket, the other hand loosely at his side. Emotional register: calm, quietly self-satisfied, a hint of private amusement.

Ancient stone temple interior: soaring stone vaulted ceiling five to six times human height, thick stone walls, tall narrow arched windows casting slanted grey light, coarse-hewn stone floor.

Soft diffuse grey light from arched windows falls across the man's face from the upper left; the pocket area is in slight shadow, drawing the eye subtly to his concealing hand. Muted cool tones overall with warm skin tones on the face.

Adult male figure at normal human scale: short slightly dishevelled brown hair, blue-grey eyes, deep-blue long coat with lapels and brass buttons, white shirt collar visible at neck, light grey breeches, black knee-high leather boots. Short stubble on jaw.

Four-panel 2×2 grid divided by thin white straight lines, no rounded corners, no shadow, no gradient, no gap between panels. Top-left panel: the tiny emperor standing on a small wooden platform gesturing imperiously upward, the giant crouching low to present his long sword horizontally at the emperor's eye level, the emperor leaning in to examine it with intense curiosity. Top-right panel: the giant holds a pistol upright in one hand, explaining it with an open gesturing palm of the other hand, the emperor staring at the strange metal object, a tiny colonel figure nearby watching attentively. Bottom-left panel: extreme close-up of the giant's hands — one holds the pistol, the other carefully pours coarse black powder from a small pouch into the barrel, focused and deliberate. Bottom-right panel: the giant fires the pistol skyward, a sharp flash and smoke burst at the muzzle, tiny soldiers on the ground below scatter in all directions with arms raised and bodies thrown back in startled panic, hats flying off; strong action energy.

Top-left: calm and curious tone. Top-right: explanatory calm. Bottom-left: focused close detail. Bottom-right: explosive action, high emotional intensity, strong sense of shock and surprise among soldiers.

Open flat grassland: wide even meadow, open horizon, low distant shrubline, ground showing small wooden stake marks and rope-net impressions, small low wooden platform slightly left of centre.

Top-left and top-right: bright even daylight, clear sky light. Bottom-left: close neutral light on hands. Bottom-right: sharp muzzle-flash light, dramatic contrast, smoke cloud catching bright sunlight.

Adult giant male: short slightly dishevelled brown hair, deep-blue long coat with brass buttons, white collar, light grey breeches, black knee-high boots, short stubble on jaw. Tiny emperor: extremely small figure, slicked-back black hair, small gold crown with red gem, deep-red velvet robe with gold trim, gold belt. Tiny colonel: extremely small figure, red military jacket with gold epaulettes, silver medals, black leather belt.

Single panel, no outer border. Close-up shot: the giant's large hand extended flat, a pocket watch resting in the centre of the palm. The tiny emperor stands directly on the palm beside the watch, leaning forward with hands clasped behind his back, face very close to the watch dial, one ear tilted toward it as if listening to the ticking sound. His expression is one of absorbed fascination and wonder.

The watch face is clearly visible — clock hands and numerals legible, gold case catching the light, chain draped across the giant's fingers. The emperor's tiny silhouette beside the watch emphasises the extraordinary scale contrast.

Open flat grassland: wide even meadow, open sky above, soft ground detail below the hand.

Bright warm daylight from slightly above, casting soft shadows beneath the watch and the tiny emperor's feet; gold watch case gleams warmly, skin tones warm and natural.

Two-panel horizontal split divided by a thin white straight line, no rounded corners, no shadow, no gradient, no gap between panels. Left panel: the giant's large open hand held out at waist height, palm up; a group of six to eight tiny people in colourful folk costumes dancing joyfully on the palm, arms raised, mid-leap, forming a loose circle, smiling and laughing. The giant watches from above with a warm amused expression. Right panel: close-up of the giant's head — his expression relaxed and gently amused; several tiny children visible nestled among his brown hair, some peeking out from between locks, one hiding behind his ear, all laughing in delight, playing hide and seek.

Left panel atmosphere: cheerful, warm, communal joy. Right panel atmosphere: playful, intimate, light-hearted.

Open flat grassland: wide even meadow, open sky, low distant shrubline.

Left panel: bright warm afternoon sunlight, cheerful open light, vivid colours on the tiny dancing figures. Right panel: soft warm light on the giant's hair and face, the tiny children's faces bright and expressive.

Adult giant male: short slightly dishevelled brown hair, deep-blue long coat with brass buttons, white collar, short stubble on jaw. Tiny villagers on palm: varied folk dress in warm colours, small scale. Tiny children in hair: small rounded shapes with expressive faces, simple clothes.

Single panel, no outer border. Medium wide shot inside a grand throne hall, centred on the interaction between the giant seated cross-legged on the floor to keep his head lower, and the tiny emperor standing on a raised dais at the far end of the long red carpet, gesturing in invitation with one arm extended outward, the other hand held to his chest in a formal courtly manner. Court ministers and attendants line both sides of the hall in neat rows, watching the scene. The composition uses the hall's converging perspective lines to draw the eye from the foreground giant to the tiny emperor at the vanishing point.

The giant's expression shows polite interest and gentle curiosity. The emperor's gesture is formal and proud. The attending court figures are still and attentive.

Grand palace audience hall: high vaulted ceiling six to eight times human height, long red carpet running the full length, raised throne dais at far end, stone columns on both sides, stained glass windows casting coloured light patches, heraldic banners hanging from columns, large metal candelabras.

Rich coloured light from stained glass windows scattering patches of red and gold across the floor; warm candlelight supplementing from flanking candelabras; overall warm and ceremonial mood.

Two-panel horizontal split divided by a thin white straight line, no rounded corners, no shadow, no gradient, no gap between panels. Left panel: wide shot of a spacious performance hall interior, a thin rope stretched horizontally at mid-height between two posts; a line of tiny court ministers in formal court dress dance along the rope — some balancing with arms outstretched, some mid-leap, one doing a precarious split, all concentrating intensely; the emperor sits watching from his elevated chair at the right side. Right panel: a moment later — one minister has slipped and tumbles through the air, arms flailing, face expressing shock and pain, other ministers above wincing and recoiling; one figure has already landed awkwardly on the floor below, holding a twisted ankle, grimacing.

Left panel: tense concentration mixed with showmanship. Right panel: sudden accident, shock and pain, medium emotional intensity.

Spacious performance hall: wide open central performance space, long tables and high-backed chairs on the right side for the emperor's seating, heavy draped curtains on walls, large hanging chandelier overhead, polished wooden floor.

Left panel: bright overhead chandelier light illuminating the rope performance evenly, warm amber tones. Right panel: same warm light but with the falling figure catching a sharp dramatic highlight as it drops.

Tiny court ministers on rope: extremely small figures in formal deep-blue and burgundy court robes, some with small official caps. Tiny emperor in his chair: small gold crown, deep-red robe with gold trim. Falling and fallen ministers: same court attire, expressions of shock and pain.

Two-panel horizontal split divided by a thin white straight line, no rounded corners, no shadow, no gradient, no gap between panels. Left panel: the tiny emperor and empress seated side by side in large high-backed chairs on a low dais; between them on a small table three coils of thread — one vivid blue, one red, one green — clearly visible and prominent; both figures seated formally, the emperor's hands resting on the armrests, the empress with hands folded in her lap; a first minister stands nearby in attendance. Right panel: a group of six to eight tiny dancers in light performance costumes enter the hall through large side doors, bowing as they enter; simultaneously the emperor has risen slightly and now holds a long thin wooden stick out horizontally in front of himself at waist height, his posture erect and proud.

Left panel: formal, ceremonial stillness. Right panel: movement and anticipation, the entrance of performers creating energy.

Spacious performance hall: wide open central performance space, long tables and high-backed chairs on right side, heavy draped curtains, large hanging chandelier, polished wooden floor.

Left panel: warm candlelight from chandelier and wall sconces, soft shadows, rich warm tones on the throne area. Right panel: slightly brighter light as the doors open, hint of cooler light from the doorway mixing with the warm hall light.

Tiny emperor: extremely small figure, slicked-back black hair, small gold crown with red gem, deep-red velvet robe with gold trim, gold belt. Tiny empress: extremely small figure, dark brown hair pinned high with gold hairpin, silver crown with blue gem, pale pink court dress with white lace trim at chest, gold slender belt. Court dancers: small figures in light flowing performance costumes. Three thread coils on table: distinctly blue, red, and green.

Four-panel 2×2 grid divided by thin white straight lines, no rounded corners, no shadow, no gradient, no gap between panels. Top-left panel: the giant sits on the grass, chin resting thoughtfully on one hand, watching the tiny emperor proudly reviewing a miniature military parade far below; the giant's expression shows a gentle idea forming, eyes slightly brightened with inspiration, a small quiet smile. Top-right panel: the giant kneels on the ground, carefully pushing several thin sticks vertically into the earth in a row, spacing them evenly, his movements focused and deliberate. Bottom-left panel: close-up of the giant's hands tying the corners of a large white handkerchief to the tops of the arranged sticks, forming a raised flat cloth platform; several tiny horsemen on horses are being carefully lifted one by one from the ground and placed onto the handkerchief surface. Bottom-right panel: wide shot — the handkerchief platform now raised at knee height, covered with tiny mounted soldiers in formation conducting a precise military parade in the air; the emperor on the ground below looks up with an expression of pure delight and laughter, arms spread wide; surrounding tiny court figures also laugh and cheer.

Top-left: calm, contemplative, gentle warmth. Top-right: focused, quiet preparation. Bottom-left: careful, delicate action. Bottom-right: jubilant spectacle, strong joy energy.

Open flat grassland: wide even meadow, open sky, low distant shrubline, small wooden stake marks on ground.

Overall bright cheerful daylight throughout all four panels; bottom-right panel: warm golden light on the parade and joyful figures, celebratory atmosphere.

Single panel, no outer border. Wide establishing shot with strong scale contrast composition: the giant stands in the centre of a narrow stone-paved city street, feet planted wide apart, body perfectly still and upright, arms at sides, expression calm and cooperative. Viewed from a low angle slightly in front and to one side to maximise the sense of scale. Between and below his massive legs, a long column of tiny soldiers marches in neat military formation — infantry in rows, small banners carried, drummers at the front — the entire army streaming through the arch formed by his legs like a tunnel, disappearing into the distance between the stone houses. The tiny emperor watches from a reviewing position to one side, mounted on a miniature horse. The city street stretches away behind the soldiers, flanked by extremely low stone-built houses whose rooftops reach only to knee height.

Scale oppression composition: the giant's legs frame the entire lower composition like columns of a gate; the marching army is dwarfed to near-insignificance beneath him.

Lilliput capital city street: two-sided rows of extremely low stone-built cottages with rooftops at knee height, stone-paved road surface, street width approximately three to four times adult shoulder width, arched city gate at street end.

Bright even daylight, clear sky above, strong overhead light casting short shadows of the tiny soldiers beneath the giant; the street in deep perspective recedes into the distance with soldiers disappearing toward the gate.

Adult giant male: short brown hair, deep-blue long coat with brass buttons, white collar, light grey breeches, black knee-high boots, short stubble on jaw. Tiny marching army: extremely small uniformed soldiers in neat formation, small banners, drummers. Tiny emperor on horseback: small gold crown, deep-red robe, mounted on a tiny horse.
